mapper.select:
select detail_id, dict_id, label, detail_code, value, dict_sort, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time from sys_dict_detail
and dict_id = #{dictId}
and (label like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or value like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or detail_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by dict_sort asc, detail_id desc
